# Test Priority Matrix

Weighted scoring system replacing the flat P0/P1/P2 labels. Each of the 62 test cases is scored across 5 factors and sorted into run tiers.

<div class="stats-grid">
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">62</div><div class="stat-label">Test Cases</div></div>
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">10</div><div class="stat-label">Smoke</div></div>
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">25</div><div class="stat-label">Regression</div></div>
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">35</div><div class="stat-label">Open Bugs</div></div>
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">12</div><div class="stat-label">Coverage Gaps</div></div>
</div>

> Cross-references 62 test cases against 35 open bugs and 6 user workflows from the [Bug Audit](../status/bug-audit.md).

---

## Scoring Formula

```
Score = (Revenue × 0.30) + (BugDensity × 0.25) + (BlastRadius × 0.20) + (UserFrequency × 0.15) + (RegressionRisk × 0.10)
```

Each factor is scored 0–100:

| Factor | Weight | 100 | 50 | 0 |
|--------|--------|-----|----|----|
| Revenue Impact | 30% | Payment / checkout path | ROI phase | Cosmetic |
| Bug Density | 25% | 5+ open bugs in area | 2–3 open | 0 open |
| Blast Radius | 20% | Session creation (all downstream breaks) | Single phase | Isolated display |
| User Frequency | 15% | Every session | Auth-only flows | Rare edge case |
| Regression Risk | 10% | 3+ resolved bugs + state-sync pattern | 1–2 resolved | No history |

---

## Run Tiers

| Tier | Count | Threshold | When to Run |
|------|-------|-----------|-------------|
| **Smoke** | 10 | Score ≥ 70 | Every PR, every deploy |
| **Regression** | 25 | Score ≥ 45 | Nightly, before release |
| **Full** | 62 | All | Weekly comprehensive run |

---

## Smoke Tier — Revenue-Critical Path (10 tests)

Run on **every PR merge and every deploy**. These cover the end-to-end purchase flow, auth gates, and session continuity.

| Rank | TC# | Score | Test | Bugs Caught |
|------|-----|-------|------|-------------|
| 1 | 37 | 83 | Purchase via Stripe (card) | D-01, D-07, A-02, A-03 |
| 2 | 36 | 79 | Auth required before checkout | D-02 |
| 3 | 43 | 78 | New user signup | C-05 |
| 4 | 44 | 78 | Login with valid credentials | C-12, C-14 |
| 5 | 46 | 78 | Session claim preserves discovery data | A-01, C-07, C-08, C-14, E-10 |
| 6 | 47 | 75 | Auth-before-checkout phase restore | C-04 |
| 7 | 39 | 75 | Finance with Gynger | D-06 |
| 8 | 38 | 72 | Purchase via Stripe — declined card | D-01, A-02 |
| 9 | 61 | 70 | Checkout API without auth | A-05 |
| 10 | 11 | 70 | Discovery → ROI transition | E-01 |

---

### Coverage Gaps (12 open bugs with NO or WEAK test coverage)

These bugs require new or extended test cases to be reliably caught.

| Bug | Sev | Gap | Suggested Action |
|-----|-----|-----|------------------|
| A-01 | <span class="badge-critical">critical</span> | No cross-user session claim test | Flag for new security TC |
| A-05 | <span class="badge-high">high</span> | No DualAuth bypass test | Flag for new security TC |
| E-01 | <span class="badge-high">high</span> | No stuck-transition recovery test | Add to existing chat-edge-cases |
| F-02 | <span class="badge-high">high</span> | No concurrent ROI fetch race test | Add to ROI section |
| B-10 | <span class="badge-high">high</span> | No greenlight→ROI robot mismatch test | Add to nonlinear section |
| C-09 | <span class="badge-medium">medium</span> | No logout cleanup verification | Extend TC-48 |
| C-13 | <span class="badge-medium">medium</span> | No stale cache key test | New session TC |
| E-02 | <span class="badge-medium">medium</span> | No case-insensitive reset test | Add to chat-edge-cases |
| E-04 | <span class="badge-medium">medium</span> | No optimistic-clear test | Add to chat-edge-cases |
| E-05 | <span class="badge-medium">medium</span> | No conversation ID cleanup test | Add to session tests |
| G-01 | <span class="badge-medium">medium</span> | No session expiry duplication test | Add to session tests |
| E-11 | <span class="badge-medium">medium</span> | No early token budget warning test | Add to error states |

::: warning Coverage Gap Impact
The 12 gaps include **1 critical** (A-01: session claim hijack) and **4 high** severity bugs. Until new TCs are added, these bugs can only be caught by manual testing.
:::

---

## What to Run When

Decision tree by code area changed:

```
Code changed?
├── src/api/routes/checkout.py or src/services/checkout_service.py
│   └── Run: Smoke (all 10)
├── src/api/routes/auth.py or src/api/deps.py
│   └── Run: Smoke (all 10)
├── src/services/roi_service.py or src/services/recommendation_*.py
│   └── Run: Smoke + TC-28, 29, 13, 14, 31, 50
├── src/api/routes/sessions.py or src/services/session_service.py
│   └── Run: TC-1, 2, 46, 49, 50, 51, 11
├── src/api/routes/conversations.py or src/services/chat_service.py
│   └── Run: TC-6, 7, 11, 12, 17, 58
├── src/api/routes/robots.py or robot_catalog changes
│   └── Run: TC-22, 28, 35, 37, 39
├── Frontend: components/chat/*
│   └── Run: TC-6, 11, 12, 17, 55, 58
├── Frontend: components/greenlight/*
│   └── Run: TC-35, 36, 37, 38, 39, 41
├── Frontend: components/roi/*
│   └── Run: TC-28, 29, 30, 31, 32, 33, 50
├── Frontend: state/* or context/*
│   └── Run: Smoke + TC-1, 2, 49, 50, 51
├── Frontend: components/auth/*
│   └── Run: TC-43, 44, 45, 46, 47, 48
├── Frontend: components/marketplace/*
│   └── Run: TC-22, 23, 24, 25, 26, 27
├── Frontend: mobile-specific CSS or responsive changes
│   └── Run: TC-54, 55, 56, 57
├── supabase/migrations/*
│   └── Run: Regression (all 25)
└── Unknown / large refactor
    └── Run: Full (all 62)
```

---

## Workflow → TC Mapping

Each of the 6 user workflows from the [Bug Audit](../status/bug-audit.md) mapped to the test cases that exercise them:

| Workflow | Description | Key TCs |
|----------|-------------|---------|
| W1 | Anonymous Discovery → ROI | 1, 2, 6, 7, 11, 12, 13, 14, 28, 29 |
| W2 | Anonymous → Signs Up → Checkout | 36, 37, 38, 39, 43, 46, 47 |
| W3 | Return Authenticated User (Logout → Login) | 44, 48, 49 |
| W4 | Reset Session ("Start Over") | 17 |
| W5 | Manual Answer Edit → ROI Re-evaluation | 18, 19, 50 |
| W6 | Greenlight Team Invitation | 41 |
